title: Nautilus
description: Adds a Nautilus mob that hides in suspicious gravel underwater.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wrmx90yJxjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The nautilus is an ancient mob found in the suspicious gravel of cold ocean ruins.

When found, the nautilus will look for another gravel block to hide in.

Kill a nautilus to get its shell.

> **Note:**
> 
> If installing as a datapack, make sure to download the *Required Resource Pack* from the *Versions* tab.

![A player brushing a nautilus out of a suspicious gravel block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05db26a80db9bbaf45463e0f347e1ac1d12a93d6.jpeg)
